name: siege
_comment: The world's `fallen` transform of the ember, in sound. The SAME ember_theme — but inverted (its rising hope turned to a falling line) and dropped an octave into a minor dirge. This is the audio twin of the sprite Lab's dark-knight palette-swap: darken the root motif once in the world, and both media fall together.

sections.name: dread
sections._comment: A low string drone and a tolling bell — the cold host at the gate.

sections.name: assault
sections._comment: The fallen theme: ember_theme inverted + an octave down on the brass, over a grinding wall and a war drum. Recognisably the hero hook, turned against itself.
